Interface IRasterFunctionTemplate3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster template function.

[Guid("A4D65F9B-2ACE-4089-941D-EB9ADE49A29B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterFunctionTemplate3 : IRasterFunctionTemplate2, IRasterFunctionTemplate
